description: Visual Studio 2022 is open with the LibraryApi ASP.NET Core solution. Implement a database seeding routine in Program.cs that populates the local SQLite database using the JSON dataset located at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\books_catalog.json. The routine should only execute if the Books DbSet in AppDbContext is empty. When mapping from BookDto to the Book entity, flatten the data by joining the Authors string array into a single comma-separated AuthorNames string and mapping PublishDetails.Year to PublishYear. Ensure the application builds and the seeding logic is successfully integrated with the database context.
